prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-MINISANDSIFTERS-ASSORTEDCOLORS Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor (1 UNIT) Sand Sifter Sieve Rocks and Mineral Collection Equipment (Colors Ship at Random) Description: Classifying your raw material deposit down to classified paydirt is an essential step in successful gold panning. These ASR Outdoor classifier screens or sand sifters are a great starter piece of gold prospecting equipment for beginners or kids, who are just getting into this fun and challenging hobby, and who want to work with a small amount of raw material.

Each sifter features 36 holes per square inch, which will allow it to sift through medium-coarse to fine materials. With built in handles, the sifting sieves are made of durable, high quality plastic that won’t rust, so you can count on them rain or shine. Take it with you while camping or hiking near rivers, lakes, and beaches for a fun activity with family and friends.

Colors ship at random (blue, yellow, green or red). Search Terms: rocks and mineral dig kit gemstone paydirt sand sifter sieve classifier screen camping gear kids activity kit metal detecting gold mining geodes gemstones fossils crystals Features: - PLASTIC SAND SIFTER: ASR Outdoor small plastic classifier screens or sand sifters are a great beginner tool to include with your small rocks and mineral sand sifting equipment; ideal for working with smaller amount of raw material that isn't too coarse - STACKABLE DESIGN: With built in handles, these classifier screens have been designed to stack within one another, making them easy to carry and store - 36 HOLES PER SQUARE INCH: Each sand sifter features 36 holes per square inch, making them ideal for sifting raw material that is medium-coarse to fine - DURABLE PLASTIC MATERIAL: Made of durable, high quality plastic that won’t rust, so you can count on these sieves, classifier screens or sand sifters to work rain or shine - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9.75 x 9.75 x 1.5 inches; Diameter: 8.5 inches; Weight: 0.10lbs; Material: Plastic; Note: Colors Ship at Random === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Sand Sifter Sieve Classifier Screen

anthropic.title_differentiation: 36 Holes Per Square Inch, Stackable Design, Durable Plastic, Gold Panning, Gemstone And Rock Sifting

openai.title_differentiation: Plastic Classifier Screen, 36 Holes Per Square Inch, Stackable Handles, Rustproof Durable Plastic, Random Colors
